# Private Jet Business Mentorship — Official Page

> Stephen Akintayo Foundation presents an exclusive one-day private jet business mentorship with Dr. Stephen Akintayo, Founder of SACI Holdings. Departure and return: Lagos, Nigeria. Limited to 18 mentees.

## Canonical facts

- Event name: Private Jet Business Mentorship (18th Anniversary Edition)
- Host: Dr. Stephen Akintayo, Founder SACI Holdings
- Organizer: Stephen Akintayo Foundation
- Event date: 27 May 2026
- Registration deadline: 25 May 2026 (payment must be complete)
- Location: Pick-up and same-day return in Lagos, Nigeria; multi-state business visits by private jet during the day
- Capacity: Strictly 18 mentees only
- Donation: ₦5,000,000 (NGN); installment plans allowed if fully paid by 25 May 2026
- Bonus: Access to 18th Year Anniversary Celebration & Dinner, 28–30 May 2026

## What participants receive

1. In-air mentorship session with Dr. Stephen Akintayo
2. Full day staying with Dr. Akintayo (not a brief meet-and-greet)
3. Visits to participating mentees' businesses across Nigerian states via private jet
4. Luxury travel, relaxation, and lunch provided during the trip
5. Networking with high-net-worth individuals (HNIs)
6. Professional photography and video for personal branding and business influence
7. Access to anniversary celebration and dinner (28–30 May 2026)

## Registration & contact

- Pay online (Paystack): https://paystack.shop/pay/ggiuvqtvjp
- Email: PRODUCTS@STEPHENAKINTAYO.COM
- Phone: +234 811 018 0000, +234 816 790 1719
- Sponsorship/partnership: same email and phone lines
- Website: https://gtextsoft.github.io/PJMENT/

## Geographic scope

Primary market: Nigeria (Lagos). Audience: established business owners and entrepreneurs seeking mentorship, HNI connections, and premium business visibility.
